ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the vehicle */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the color of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "msrp" REAL /* Manufacturer's Suggested Retail Price */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Current sale price */,
  "is_certified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the vehicle is certified */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the vehicle is stored */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., available, sold, reserved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make_id FOREIGN KEY ("make_id") REFERENCES makes ("make_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_color_id FOREIGN KEY ("color_id") REFERENCES colors ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "makes" (
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each make */,
  "make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the make */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the make */,
  "logo" TEXT /* File path to the make's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "make_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the make of the model */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Type of body (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of engine (e.g., V6, I4) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., gasoline, diesel, electric) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., automatic, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "colors" (
  "color_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each color */,
  "color_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle color */,
  "rgb_code" TEXT /* RGB code of the color */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code of the color */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("color_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle condition (e.g., new, used, certified) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the condition */,
  "inspection_required" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if inspection is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle feature (e.g., sunroof, leather seats) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the feature */,
  "icon" TEXT /* File path to the icon representing the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., vehicle history report, maintenance record) */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_description" TEXT /* Description of the document */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the document is confidential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_documents_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the image belongs to */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the image was taken */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the image is the primary image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_images_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_features_map" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the feature */,
  "added_date" TEXT /* Date the feature was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_conditions_map" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition */,
  "inspected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who inspected the vehicle */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was inspected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id", "condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales representative, customer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the request */,
  "processed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who processed the request */,
  "processed_date" TEXT /* Date the request was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_requests_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who sold the vehicle */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the sale was made */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price of the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who purchased the vehicle */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the sale */,
  "is_paid" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the payment has been made */,
  "sales_tax" REAL /* Amount of sales tax applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the inventory is stored */,
  "is_display" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the vehicle is for display */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
